seo.title: Wholesale Stainless Steel Flush Mount Halo Letters — EdgeLuxe LP 3.2 | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale fabricated stainless steel flush-mount letters with partial side-lit halo effect. German-engineered. Trade pricing for sign shops only.

de.title: Großhandel Edelstahl Flush Mount Halo Letters — EdgeLuxe LP 3.2 | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Großhandel fabricated Edelstahl flächenbündig letters with partial seitenbeleuchtet halo effect. Mit deutscher Ingenieurskunst. Händlerpreise for Schilderwerkstätten only.

data.subtitle:
Fabricated stainless steel letters mounted flush against the surface with a partial side-lit halo effect. The EdgeLuxe LP 3.2 delivers an elegant, understated glow from its edges — perfect for modern architectural applications where a clean profile is essential.

German-engineered precision. UL listed. Wholesale direct to sign shops across the USA and Canada.

de.subtitle:
Fabricated Edelstahl letters mounted flush against the surface with a partial seitenbeleuchtet halo effect. The EdgeLuxe LP 3.2 delivers an elegant, understated glow from its edges — perfect for modern architectural applications where a clean profile is essential.

Deutsche Ingenieurs-Präzision. UL-zertifiziert. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten across the USA und Kanada.

items.title: Partial Side-Lit Halo
items.description: Flush-mounted design creates an elegant partial side-lit halo effect. Light bleeds around the edges for a sophisticated, modern look.

items.title: Flush-Mount Installation
items.description: Mounts directly to the surface with no visible standoffs or spacers. Clean, minimal profile that sits tight against any wall or fascia.

items.title: UL Listed
items.description: Every illuminated letter set ships with UL listing labels and documentation for fast, compliant permitting.

items.title: Full Customization
items.description: Painted in any PMS color. Options for vinyls or pigmented translucent acrylics for colored halo effects.

items.title: Multiple Depth Options
items.description: Available in 30mm, 50mm, 80mm, and 100mm depths to match any project scale and desired illumination.

items.title: Serviceable LEDs
items.description: Fabricated stainless steel construction allows LED modules to be accessed and replaced in the field for easy long-term maintenance.

items.title: Partial Side-Lit Halo
items.description: Flush-mounted design creates an elegant partial seitenbeleuchtet halo effect. Light bleeds around the edges for a sophisticated, modern look.

items.title: Flächenbündig Installation
items.description: Mounts directly to the surface with no visible Abstandshalters or spacers. Clean, minimal profile that sits tight against any wall or fascia.

items.title: UL-zertifiziert
items.description: Every illuminated letter set ships with UL-Zertifizierung labels and documentation for fast, compliant permitting.

items.title: Full Customization
items.description: Painted in any PMS color. Options for vinyls or pigmented translucent acrylics for colored halo effects.

items.title: Multiple Depth Options
items.description: Available in 30mm, 50mm, 80mm, and 100mm depths to match any project scale and desired illumination.

items.title: Serviceable LEDs
items.description: Fabricated Edelstahl construction allows LED modules to be accessed and replaced in the field for easy long-term maintenance.

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Built to meet and exceed industry standards. Every specification reflects our commitment to quality and longevity. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: Stainless steel flush mount letter — cross-section detail showing LED placement

de.heading: Handelsspezifikationen
de.description: Gebaut um Branchenstandards zu erfüllen und zu übertreffen. Jede Spezifikation spiegelt unser Engagement für Qualität und Langlebigkeit wider. Exklusiv zu Großhandelspreisen verfügbar.

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Flush mount stainless steel letters deliver a clean, architectural look that elevates any brand. Perfect for environments where a minimal profile and sophisticated glow are essential. Wholesale direct to sign shops for all project types.

de.heading: Häufige Anwendungen
de.description: Flush mount Edelstahl letters deliver a clean, architectural look that elevates any brand. Perfect for environments where a minimal profile and sophisticated glow are essential. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten for all project types.
